message.content:
I'll analyze this website design screenshot with extreme precision to provide a pixel-perfect recreation guide. Here's the detailed breakdown:

## Overall Layout & Structure
- **Background**: Solid black (#000000)
- **Layout**: Three-column grid layout with equal spacing between columns
- **Central Element**: A glowing purple circular icon with connecting lines
- **Card Layout**: Three purple cards arranged horizontally in the lower portion

## Central Icon & Connection Lines
- **Icon**: 
  - Position: Center of screen (vertically and horizontally)
  - Size: 120px diameter
  - Background: Purple gradient (#8B5CF6 to #A78BFA)
  - Content: White chat bubble icon with curved smile
  - Glow effect: 20px blur radius, rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3)
- **Connection Lines**:
  - Color: Purple (#8B5CF6)
  - Width: 2px
  - Style: Dashed lines with small dots
  - Position: Lines extend from icon to each card

## Card Design (All three cards share identical styling)
- **Card Background**: Deep purple (#1E1B2E)
- **Border**: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3)
- **Border Radius**: 16px
- **Box Shadow**: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)
- **Padding**: 32px
- **Width**: 340px
- **Height**: 420px (auto-adjust based on content)

## Typography
- **Headings**:
  - Font: Inter (or similar sans-serif)
  - Size: 24px
  - Weight: 700 (Bold)
  - Color: White (#FFFFFF)
  - Letter Spacing: -0.5px
- **Body Text**:
  - Font: Inter (or similar sans-serif)
  - Size: 16px
  - Weight: 400 (Regular)
  - Color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)
  - Line Height: 1.6
- **Subtext**:
  - Font: Inter (or similar sans-serif)
  - Size: 14px
  - Weight: 400 (Regular)
  - Color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6)
  - Line Height: 1.5

## Card 1: "Smarter & Faster Wireframes"
- **Position**: Left card
- **Heading**: "Smarter & Faster Wireframes"
- **Body**: "We rapidly turn ideas into functional wireframes using AI tools, with less"
- **Feature Items**:
  - **Visily**:
    - Icon: White checkmark in circle
    - Text: "Visily"
    - Subtext: "Design wireframes with easy"
  - **Uizard**:
    - Icon: White circular icon
    - Text: "Uizard"
    - Subtext: "Ideas into wireframes instantly"
- **Spacing**: 24px between feature items

## Card 2: "Launch Quicker, Spend Less"
- **Position**: Middle card
- **Heading**: "Launch Quicker, Spend Less"
- **Body**: "AI reduces revisions and guesswork and makes your website ready to launch"
- **Icon Grid**:
  - 3x1 grid of icons
  - Each icon: 24px size, white color
  - Icons: Rocket, checkmark, globe
  - Spacing: 16px between icons
- **Bottom Element**: 
  - Rectangle with rounded corners
  - Height: 60px
  - Background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1)
  - Checkmark icon on right side

## Card 3: "No Blank Canvas Struggles"
- **Position**: Right card
- **Heading**: "No Blank Canvas Struggles"
- **Body**: "AI generates editable mockups from prompts so we can skip the slow start"
- **Avatar**:
  - Circular image
  - Size: 80px diameter
  - Position: Centered
- **Input Field**:
  - Background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1)
  - Border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3)
  - Border Radius: 8px
  - Padding: 12px 16px
  - Text: "Create a kid wearing space helmet!"
  - Color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)
- **Button**:
  - Background: Purple gradient (#8B5CF6 to #A78BFA)
  - Color: White
  - Border: None
  - Border Radius: 8px
  - Padding: 12px 24px
  - Text: "Generate"
  - Icon: White magic wand icon
  - Font Weight: 600

## Color Palette
- **Primary Purple**: #8B5CF6
- **Light Purple**: #A78BFA
- **Dark Purple Card Background**: #1E1B2E
- **Text White**: #FFFFFF
- **Text Light**: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)
- **Text Dim**: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6)
- **Background**: #000000

## Spacing & Margins
- **Card Margin**: 24px between cards
- **Card Padding**: 32px inside each card
- **Section Margin**: 80px from top of screen to cards
- **Element Spacing**: 24px between major elements in cards
- **Icon Spacing**: 16px between icons in grid

## Button Styles
- **Primary Button**:
  - Background: Purple gradient
  - Text Color: White
  - Border: None
  - Border Radius: 8px
  - Padding: 12px 24px
  - Font Weight: 600
  - Icon: 16px size, white

## Icon Styles
- **Size**: 24px for feature icons, 16px for button icons
- **Color**: White
- **Style**: Minimal, flat design

## Exact Text Content
- **Card 1 Heading**: "Smarter & Faster Wireframes"
- **Card 1 Body**: "We rapidly turn ideas into functional wireframes using AI tools, with less"
- **Card 1 Feature 1**: "Visily" / "Design wireframes with easy"
- **Card 1 Feature 2**: "Uizard" / "Ideas into wireframes instantly"
- **Card 2 Heading**: "Launch Quicker, Spend Less"
- **Card 2 Body**: "AI reduces revisions and guesswork and makes your website ready to launch"
- **Card 3 Heading**: "No Blank Canvas Struggles"
- **Card 3 Body**: "AI generates editable mockups from prompts so we can skip the slow start"
- **Card 3 Input**: "Create a kid wearing space helmet!"
- **Card 3 Button**: "Generate"

This detailed breakdown should allow for a pixel-perfect recreation of the design. Pay special attention to the purple gradient effects, the glowing central icon, and the consistent card styling across all three columns.
